explanation: 一般过去时转换借助 did：疑问句 Did he…?，否定句 did not + 动词原形（went → go）。

answers: He went to the theatre last night.
He went to the theater last night.
Did he go to the theatre last night?
Did he go to the theater last night?
He did not go to the theatre last night.
He didn't go to the theatre last night.
He did not go to the theater last night.
He didn't go to the theater last night.
Where did he go last night?
When did he go to the theatre?
When did he go to the theater?

cn: 她总是在星期天起得很晚。
explanation: 一般现在时表习惯：疑问句用 Does she…?，否定句用 does not + 原形（gets → get）。

answers: She always gets up late on Sundays.
She always gets up late on Sunday.
Does she always get up late on Sundays?
Does she always get up late on Sunday?
She does not always get up late on Sundays.
She doesn't always get up late on Sundays.
She does not always get up late on Sunday.
She doesn't always get up late on Sunday.
When does she always get up late?

cn: 那位老人昨天在车站等了一整天。
explanation: 一般过去时 + 地点介词 at the station；对地点提问用 Where did…?

answers: The old man waited at the station all day yesterday.
The old man waited at the station the whole day yesterday.
Did the old man wait at the station all day yesterday?
The old man did not wait at the station all day yesterday.
The old man didn't wait at the station all day yesterday.

steps.prompt: 对「at the station」提问（问地点）
answers: Where did the old man wait all day yesterday?
When did the old man wait at the station all day?

explanation: 一般现在时 be 动词句也可练 Does he…? 结构；本句用 work as 表职业，借助 does 转换。

answers: He works as an engineer.
He is an engineer.

steps.prompt: 改为一般疑问句（用 He works as…）
answers: Does he work as an engineer?

steps.prompt: 改为否定句（用 He works as…）
answers: He does not work as an engineer.
He doesn't work as an engineer.
What does he do?
What does he work as?

explanation: 比较级句一般疑问句把 be 提前；对比较对象提问用 Who is taller than Jim?

answers: Tom is taller than Jim.
Tom is taller than Jim is.
Is Tom taller than Jim?
Is Tom taller than Jim is?
Tom is not taller than Jim.
Tom isn't taller than Jim.
Who is taller than Jim?
Who's taller than Jim?

cn: 他们上周在聚会上玩得很开心。
explanation: 一般过去时转换；对地点 at the party 用 Where did they…?

answers: They enjoyed themselves at the party last week.
They had a good time at the party last week.
Did they enjoy themselves at the party last week?
Did they have a good time at the party last week?
They did not enjoy themselves at the party last week.
They didn't enjoy themselves at the party last week.
They did not have a good time at the party last week.
They didn't have a good time at the party last week.

steps.prompt: 对「at the party」提问（问地点）
answers: Where did they enjoy themselves last week?
Where did they have a good time last week?
When did they enjoy themselves at the party?
When did they have a good time at the party?
